name: Thank you
template: Thank you for your kind words, {customer_name}! We're thrilled you had a great experience and look forward to serving you again.

name: Apology
template: We're sorry to hear about your experience, {customer_name}. Please reach out to our support team at {support_email} so we can make things right.

name: Neutral
template: Thanks for your feedback, {customer_name}. We appreciate your input and will use it to improve our services.
